action.command: ls /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-3/ && for f in /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-3/*.sysu.c; do echo "=== $f ==="; /workspace/YatCC/llvm/install/bin/clang -cc1 -dump-tokens "$f" 2>&1 | head -5; done

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "ls /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-3/ && for f in /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-3/*.sysu.c; do echo \"=== $f ===\"; /workspace/YatCC/llvm/install/bin/clang -cc1 -dump-tokens \"$f\" 2>&1 | head -5; done", "timeout": 30}

summary: terminal: {"command": "ls /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-3/ && for f in /workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-3/*.sysu.c; do echo \"=== $f ===\"; /workspace/YatCC/llvm/install/bin/clang -cc1 -dump-tokens \"$f\" 2>&1 | head -5; done", "timeout": 30}
